testcase.name: test_mine_has_seed_apps

failure.message: AssertionError: expected >=5 demo applications, got 0 assert 0 >= 5 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:180: in test_mine_has_seed_apps assert len(items) >= 5, f"expected >=5 demo applications, got {len(items)}" E AssertionError: expected >=5 demo applications, got 0 E assert 0 >= 5 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_create_and_duplicate
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:200: in test_create_and_duplicate assert r1.status_code in (200, 201), f"first apply failed: {r1.status_code} {r1.text}" E AssertionError: first apply failed: 400 {"detail":"No applicant profile"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
